# Step 4 ‚Äî Pacing Settings UI

> **Milestone**: M1.2.5 | **Task**: T1.2.5.1.3.1.1
> **Depends on**: Step 3 (ConfigNotifier must have `updatePacingConfig`)
> **Skills to load**: `riverpod-consumers`, `riverpod-select`, `flutter-improving-accessibility`

Load shared context: [M1.2.5 pacing context](../instructions/m1.2.5-pacing-context.instructions.md)

---

## Task

Create a `PacingPanel` ConsumerWidget and insert it into the existing settings screen.

## Files to Create / Modify

### 1. Create `lib/features/settings/widgets/pacing_panel.dart`

**Widget type**: `ConsumerWidget` (no StatefulWidget, no HookConsumerWidget needed)

**State access**: Watch `configProvider` and project `PacingConfig` via `.select(...)`:

```dart
final pacingConfig = ref.watch(
  configProvider.select((asyncConfig) => asyncConfig.valueOrNull?.pacingConfig ?? defaultPacingConfig),
);
```

**Layout structure:**

```
"Word Pacing" section heading (use same typography token as other settings headings)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Sample readout card
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ "Sample paragraph: 3.4s ‚Äî feels like 250 WPM"
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Slider: Long words (25‚Äì200%)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Slider: Complexity (25‚Äì200%)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Slider: Punctuation (25‚Äì200%)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Reset button
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ About pacing button ‚Üí opens bottom sheet
```

#### Sample Readout

Fixed sentence: `"NASA launched information about U.S. policy, well-known."` (7 words)

Tokenize once at build. On every config change, recompute:
- Total ms: sum of `durationForWord` for each word at the current WPM (read `defaultWpm` from `configProvider`)
- Effective WPM: `(wordCount / totalMs) * 60000`
- Display: `"Sample paragraph: {totalMs/1000}s ‚Äî feels like {effectiveWpm} WPM"` (numeric only, no animation)

The math is sub-microsecond; recomputing on every slider tick is fine.

#### Sliders

Three sliders, each:
- **Range**: 25‚Äì200 (percentage)
- **Step**: 5 (use `Slider.divisions` = 35)
- **Label**: "Long words", "Complexity", "Punctuation"
- **Value display**: Show numeric value next to label as `"120%"` ‚Äî no color-only signal
- **On change**: Call `ref.read(configProvider.notifier).updatePacingConfig(pacingConfig.copyWith(longWordScalePercent: newValue.round()))` (and equivalent for each slider)

#### Reset Button

```dart
TextButton.icon(
  onPressed: () => ref.read(configProvider.notifier).updatePacingConfig(defaultPacingConfig),
  icon: Icon(...),
  label: Text('Reset to defaults'),
)
```

#### About Pacing Button

Icon button + label. Opens a `showModalBottomSheet` with this copy:

> "Long words, complex words, and punctuation get a little extra time. Slide each category up to emphasize, or down to de-emphasize. This isn't speed-reading ‚Äî it's giving each word the time it earns. Defaults work for most readers."

**Copy rules:**
- No ableist language
- No fake urgency
- No countdown
- No "fix your reading" framing
- Honest, neutral tone

### 2. Modify `lib/screens/settings_screen.dart`

Insert `PacingPanel()` between existing sections. Match the visual rhythm:
- Same heading typography token as other sections
- Same spacing constants
- Wrap in the same card/container pattern used by existing sections

---

## Design System Requirements

**All enforced ‚Äî no exceptions:**

| Requirement | How |
|-------------|-----|
| Colors | `RunThruColors` (theme-aware). No raw `Color(0xFF...)` |
| Text styles | `RunThruTextStyles`. No inline `TextStyle(...)` |
| Shadows | Decoration factories. No hardcoded `BoxDecoration` shadows |
| Touch targets | ‚â• 48dp. Use `SizedBox(height: 48)` or `MaterialTapTargetSize.padded` on slider thumbs, Reset button, About button |
| Animations | If any (keep minimal): check `isReducedMotion(context)` |
| Loading indicators | None needed ‚Äî but if you add any, no raw `CircularProgressIndicator` |

Design tokens are in `lib/shared/design/`:
- `tokens.dart` ‚Üí `RunThruColors` (color tokens)
- `typography.dart` ‚Üí `RunThruTextStyles` (text style tokens)
- `decorations.dart` ‚Üí decoration factories
- `reduced_motion.dart` ‚Üí `isReducedMotion(context)` helper

If `lib/shared/design/` doesn't exist, check `lib/design/` ‚Äî the design system may not have been migrated yet.

---

## Accessibility Requirements

### Semantics

```dart
// Each slider:
Semantics(
  label: 'Long word pacing scale, currently $value percent',
  child: Slider(...),
)

// About button:
Semantics(
  button: true,
  label: 'About word pacing',
  child: ...,
)

// Reset button:
Semantics(
  button: true,
  label: 'Reset pacing to defaults',
  child: ...,
)
```

### Additional

- No color-only signals ‚Äî all slider values shown numerically
- Screen reader: slider labels include current value
- Touch targets verified at ‚â• 48dp
- Pacing controls are **NOT paywalled** ‚Äî this is an accessibility feature, free forever

---

## Verification

```powershell
dart analyze lib/features/settings/widgets/pacing_panel.dart lib/screens/settings_screen.dart
```

Zero issues required.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `PacingPanel` is a `ConsumerWidget`
- [ ] Three sliders (25‚Äì200%) wired to `ConfigNotifier.updatePacingConfig`
- [ ] Reset button restores `defaultPacingConfig`
- [ ] Sample readout updates live ‚Äî shows numeric ms + effective WPM
- [ ] About sheet present with approved copy (no ableist/dark-pattern language)
- [ ] All design system tokens used ‚Äî no raw `Color`/`TextStyle`/`BoxDecoration`
- [ ] Touch targets ‚â• 48dp on all interactive elements
- [ ] Semantics labels on all interactive elements
- [ ] `configProvider.select(...)` used for rebuild efficiency
- [ ] No `setState()` ‚Äî Riverpod only
- [ ] No `Navigator.push()` ‚Äî go_router patterns if navigation needed
- [ ] Zero analysis issues
- [ ] All public symbols have dartdoc comments
